AUTO CAVE

Bringing your collection home

Safe, discreet and beautifully designed, we create subterranean luxury garages for clients wanting a private space within their home for their collection of cars.

 

For the modern-day car collector, AUTO CAVE is the new generation of private car storage and the ultimate addition to any residence. Subterranean for safety, at home for security. Let your journey begin at home.

AUTO CAVE marks a new age of private car storage, with each luxury garage bespoke to you and your collection’s specific requirements.

Collaborating closely with you every step of the way, we ensure your luxury subterranean garage is a perfect fit for your property.
